Bug / Task Description: betweenness_centrality returns values that are exactly half the correct result for undirected graphs when normalization is enabled. The directed-graph normalization factor 1/((n-1)(n-2)) is reused for undirected graphs, but the correct factor is 2/((n-1)(n-2)) because each pair of nodes is counted once in each direction. Fix the normalization so undirected graphs produce standard betweenness-centrality scores.
Commit Subject: fix(centrality): correct betweenness normalization factor for undirected graphs
